name: Account Welcome
subject: Welcome to Coaches Hive
htmlBody:
Welcome to Coaches Hive

Hi {{first_name}},

Your account is ready. Let's get you into your dashboard.

Open dashboard

If you need help, email {{support_email}}.

name: Account Verify Email
subject: Verify your Coaches Hive email
htmlBody:
Verify your email

Hi {{first_name}},

Please verify your email to activate all features.

Verify email

If you didn't request this, ignore this message.
textBody:
Verify your email
Hi {{first_name}},
Verify here: {{action_url}}
If you didn't request this, ignore this message.

name: Account Verify Code
subject: Your Coaches Hive verification code
htmlBody:
Your verification code

Hi {{first_name}},

Use this {{code_length}}-digit verification code to continue:

{{verification_code}}

This code expires soon. Do not share it.
textBody: Your Coaches Hive verification code is {{verification_code}}. This code expires soon. Do not share it.

name: Account Password Reset
subject: Reset your Coaches Hive password
htmlBody:
Reset your password

Hi {{first_name}},

Use this secure link to reset your password.

Reset password

If you didn't request this, ignore this message.
textBody:
Reset your password
Hi {{first_name}},
Reset link: {{action_url}}
If you didn't request this, ignore this message.

name: Account Email Changed
subject: Your Coaches Hive email was changed
htmlBody:
Email updated

Hi {{first_name}},

Your account email was changed successfully.

If this was not you, secure your account now.

Secure account
textBody:
Your email was changed.
If this was not you, secure account: {{action_url}}

name: Subscription Updated
subject: Your Coaches Hive plan was updated
htmlBody:
Plan updated

Hi {{first_name}},

Your plan is now {{plan_name}}.

Next billing date: {{next_bill_date}}

View billing

name: Subscription Payment Failed
subject: Payment failed for your Coaches Hive plan
htmlBody:
Payment failed

Hi {{first_name}},

We couldn't process your subscription payment.

Please update your payment method to avoid interruption.

Update payment method
textBody:
Payment failed for your plan.
Update payment method: {{action_url}}

name: Booking Confirmation Athlete
subject: Booking confirmed with {{coach_name}}
htmlBody:
Booking confirmed

Hi {{first_name}},

Your session with {{coach_name}} is confirmed.

{{session_date}} at {{session_time}} - {{session_location}}

Type: {{session_type}}

View booking

name: Booking Confirmation Coach
subject: New booking from {{athlete_name}}
htmlBody:
New booking

Hi {{first_name}},

{{athlete_name}} booked a session with you.

{{session_date}} at {{session_time}} - {{session_location}}

Type: {{session_type}}

Open calendar

name: Session Reminder
subject: Reminder: Session at {{session_time}}
htmlBody:
Session reminder

Hi {{first_name}},

This is a reminder for your session {{session_date}} at {{session_time}}.

Coach: {{coach_name}}

Location: {{session_location}}

Open session

name: Session Rescheduled
subject: Session rescheduled to {{session_date}} at {{session_time}}
htmlBody:
Session rescheduled

Hi {{first_name}},

Your session has been moved to {{session_date}} at {{session_time}}.

Location: {{session_location}}

View updated booking

name: Session Canceled
subject: Session canceled
htmlBody:
Session canceled

Hi {{first_name}},

Your session on {{session_date}} at {{session_time}} was canceled.

Manage bookings

name: Payment Receipt
subject: Payment receipt {{receipt_id}}
htmlBody:
Payment receipt

Hi {{first_name}},

Amount: {{amount}} {{currency}}

Receipt: {{receipt_id}}

View payments

name: Refund Receipt
subject: Refund processed {{receipt_id}}
htmlBody:
Refund processed

Hi {{first_name}},

Your refund has been processed.

Amount: {{amount}} {{currency}}

Reference: {{receipt_id}}

name: Payout Sent
subject: Payout sent to your account
htmlBody:
Payout sent

Hi {{first_name}},

Your payout of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been sent.

View payout details

name: Marketplace Order Confirmation Buyer
subject: Order confirmed #{{order_id}}
htmlBody:
Order confirmed

Hi {{first_name}},

Your marketplace order #{{order_id}} is confirmed.

View order
textBody:
Order confirmed #{{order_id}}
View order: {{dashboard_url}}

name: Marketplace New Order Seller
subject: New marketplace order #{{order_id}}
htmlBody:
New order received

Hi {{first_name}},

You received a new marketplace order: #{{order_id}}.

Fulfill order
textBody:
New order received #{{order_id}}
Fulfill order: {{dashboard_url}}

name: Marketplace Order Update
subject: Order update #{{order_id}}
htmlBody:
Order update

Hi {{first_name}},

Your order #{{order_id}} has a status update.

{{message_preview}}

Track order

name: Support Ticket Received
subject: We received your support request #{{ticket_id}}
htmlBody:
Support request received

Hi {{first_name}},

We got your request. Ticket ID: {{ticket_id}}.

Our team will reply as soon as possible.

View support

name: Support Ticket Reply
subject: Update on your support ticket #{{ticket_id}}
htmlBody:
Support update

Hi {{first_name}},

We replied to ticket #{{ticket_id}}.

{{message_preview}}

Read reply

name: Guardian Approval Request
subject: Approval needed for {{athlete_name}}
htmlBody:
Guardian approval requested

Hi {{first_name}},

{{athlete_name}} needs your approval to continue.

Review request
textBody:
Approval needed for {{athlete_name}}
Review request: {{action_url}}

name: Guardian Approved
subject: Guardian approval completed
htmlBody:
Approval completed

Hi {{first_name}},

Guardian approval is complete. Access is now enabled.

Continue
textBody:
Guardian approval completed.
Continue: {{dashboard_url}}

name: Guardian Declined
subject: Guardian approval was declined
htmlBody:
Approval declined

Hi {{first_name}},

Guardian approval was declined. Contact support for next steps.

Contact support
textBody:
Guardian approval was declined.
Contact support: {{support_email}}

name: Org Invite
subject: You're invited to join {{org_name}} on Coaches Hive
htmlBody:
You're invited

Hi {{first_name}},

You've been invited to join {{org_name}} on Coaches Hive.

Accept invite
textBody:
You're invited to join {{org_name}}.
Accept invite: {{action_url}}

name: Org Role Changed
subject: Your role was updated in {{org_name}}
htmlBody:
Role updated

Hi {{first_name}},

Your role in {{org_name}} is now {{role_name}}.

Open organization portal
textBody:
Your role in {{org_name}} was updated to {{role_name}}.
Open portal: {{dashboard_url}}
